# CSS adjust

1. div has class ht-container
  - add style position: absolute;
  - add style top: 0;
  - add style left: 0;
  - add style width: 100vw;
  - add style height: 100vw;
2. div has class ht-foot
  - add style display:none
3. div has class contextnav__header
  - add style display:none
4. div has class c360-nav-container
  - add style display:none
5. Element c-hc-article-top-bar
  - add style display:none
6. Element c-hc-alert-banner-wrapper
  - add style display:none
7. div has Id embedded-messaging
  - add style display:none

# Javascript
modudles/c/hcArticleViewer.js  
Replace all this.handleArticleSize(), to blank


# 

```

         <ul lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><li title="Define Billing Milestones" id="billing_milestone_methods_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

         <ul lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><li title="Method 1: Configure Billing Milestones Using Billing Treatments" data-is-link="true" id="billing_milestone_treatment_and_item_create_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="4" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

         </li><li title="Method 2: Create Billing Milestone Plans and Plan Items" data-is-link="true" id="billing_milestone_create_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="4" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

               <button class="slds-button slds-button_icon-bare slds-m-left_xx-small slds-m-right_x-small slds-is-disabled" disabled="disabled" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><path fill="#706E6B" d="m17.9 4.4l20.7 20.5c0.6 0.6 0.6 1.6 0 2.2l-20.7 20.5c-0.6 0.6-1.6 0.6-2.2 0l-2.2-2.2c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l16.3-16.1c0.6-0.6 0.6-1.6 0-2.2l-16.2-16.1c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l2.2-2.2c0.6-0.5 1.5-0.5 2.1 0z" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""></path></svg></button>

            </div>
         </li></ul></li></ul></li></ul></li></ul></li><li title="Revenue Cloud Operations Console" id="revenue_operations_console_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="1" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">
            <div class="slds-tree__item" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

               <a role="presentation" href="https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=ind.revenue_operations_console.htm&amp;language=en_US&amp;type=5" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">Revenue Cloud Operations Console</a>
            </div>
         <ul lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><li title="Monitor and Troubleshoot Pricing Issues" id="pricing_operations_console_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="2" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">
            <div class="slds-tree__item" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

            </div>
         <ul lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><li title="Understand Your Pricing Data" data-is-link="true" id="pricing_pricing_operations_console_sections_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">
            <div class="slds-tree__item" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

            </div>
         </li><li title="Investigate and Analyze Pricing API Execution Logs" data-is-link="true" id="pricing_view_pricing_api_execution_logs_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">
            <div class="slds-tree__item" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">
               <button class="slds-button slds-button_icon-bare slds-m-left_xx-small slds-m-right_x-small slds-is-disabled" disabled="disabled" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><path fill="#706E6B" d="m17.9 4.4l20.7 20.5c0.6 0.6 0.6 1.6 0 2.2l-20.7 20.5c-0.6 0.6-1.6 0.6-2.2 0l-2.2-2.2c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l16.3-16.1c0.6-0.6 0.6-1.6 0-2.2l-16.2-16.1c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l2.2-2.2c0.6-0.5 1.5-0.5 2.1 0z" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""></path></svg></button>

            </div>
         </li><li title="Resolve API Execution Errors" data-is-link="true" id="pricing_understand_and_resolve_api_execution_messages_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

            </div>
         </li><li title="Set Up Advanced Price Logs" data-is-link="true" id="pricing_advanced_price_log_settings_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

            </div>
         </li></ul></li><li title="Troubleshoot Product Configurations" id="revenue_product_configuration_logs_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="2" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

               <a role="presentation" href="https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=ind.revenue_product_configuration_logs.htm&amp;language=en_US&amp;type=5" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">Troubleshoot Product Configurations</a>
            </div>
         <ul lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><li title="Set Up Product Configuration Logs" data-is-link="true" id="revenue_product_configuration_logs_set_up_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

               <button class="slds-button slds-button_icon-bare slds-m-left_xx-small slds-m-right_x-small slds-is-disabled" disabled="disabled" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><path fill="#706E6B" d="m17.9 4.4l20.7 20.5c0.6 0.6 0.6 1.6 0 2.2l-20.7 20.5c-0.6 0.6-1.6 0.6-2.2 0l-2.2-2.2c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l16.3-16.1c0.6-0.6 0.6-1.6 0-2.2l-16.2-16.1c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l2.2-2.2c0.6-0.5 1.5-0.5 2.1 0z" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""></path></svg></button>

         </li><li title="Turn On Configuration Logs" data-is-link="true" id="revenue_product_configuration_logs_view_leaf" role="treeitem" aria-level="3" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">

               <a role="presentation" href="/s/articleView?id=ind.revenue_product_configuration_logs_view.htm&amp;language=en_US&amp;type=5" lwc-g4l6pknunt="">Turn On Configuration Logs</a>
            </div>
         </li></ul></li></ul></li></ul></content></div></div></div><div class="chevron-icon" style="display: none;" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 52 52" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""><path fill="#706E6B" d="m17.9 4.4l20.7 20.5c0.6 0.6 0.6 1.6 0 2.2l-20.7 20.5c-0.6 0.6-1.6 0.6-2.2 0l-2.2-2.2c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l16.3-16.1c0.6-0.6 0.6-1.6 0-2.2l-16.2-16.1c-0.6-0.6-0.6-1.6 0-2.2l2.2-2.2c0.6-0.5 1.5-0.5 2.1 0z" lwc-g4l6pknunt=""></path></svg></div></c-hc-table-of-content></div><div class="overlay" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""></div><div lwc-3eigj2skqo3="" class="content with-toc"><content lwc-3eigj2skqo3="" class="desktop-and-toc-opened">

















<title lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management Personas for Revenue Cloud</title>






















<a name="product_catalog_product_catalog_management_personas" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="" href="https://help.salesforce.com/s?language=en_US"></a><div class="slds-text-longform" id="content" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><div class="slds-max-small-hide slds-p-bottom_medium" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><p class="slds-assistive-text" id="bread-crumb-label" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">You are here:</p><ol style="list-style-type:none;" aria-labelledby="bread-crumb-label" class="slds-breadcrumb slds-list_horizontal slds-wrap" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><li class="slds-breadcrumb__item slds-text-title_caps" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><a href="/s/?language=en_US" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="" target="_blank">Salesforce Help</a></li><li class="slds-breadcrumb__item slds-text-title_caps" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><a href="/s/products?language=en_US" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="" target="_blank">Docs</a></li><li class="slds-breadcrumb__item slds-text-title_caps" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><a href="https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=ind.revenue_lifecycle_management.htm&amp;language=en_US&amp;type=5" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Revenue Cloud</a></li></ol></div>
  <h1 class="slds-text-heading_large" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Personas for Revenue Cloud</h1>
  
  <p lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Explore the different types of users who work with Product Catalog Management and the
    permission sets they need.</p>
<div class="slds-section slds-is-open" id="hiddenTables" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><div class="slds-section__title" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><h3 class="slds-text-title_caps" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Required Editions</h3></div><div class="slds-section__content" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""></div>
    <table class="slds-table slds-table_bordered slds-m-bottom_small edition" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><colgroup lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><col lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""></colgroup><tbody lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Available in: Lightning Experience</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Available in: <strong lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Enterprise</strong>, <strong lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Unlimited</strong>, and <strong lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Developer</strong> Editions
              of Revenue Cloud</td>

          </tr>
        </tbody></table>
    <div lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><h2 class="slds-text-heading_medium slds-p-top_small" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Create Users and Profiles</h2><p lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">To begin, create users for Product Catalog Management. Then assign users the appropriate
        permission sets. To help you plan, refer to the Product Catalog Management personas
        table.</p><p lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">When you create a user, you must also assign a profile. Profiles define default settings
        for users. Some organizations create their own profiles, while others choose to use profiles
        included with Salesforce.</p><p lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Remember, users can have only one profile, but can have many permission sets assigned to
        them.</p></div>
    <div lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><table class="slds-table slds-table_bordered slds-m-bottom_small" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><colgroup lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><col style="width:25%" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><col style="width:50%" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><col style="width:25%" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""></colgroup><thead class="slds-text-title_caps" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <th id="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" scope="col" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Persona</th>
            <th id="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" scope="col" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Description</th>
            <th id="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" scope="col" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Required Permission Sets</th>
          </tr>
        </thead><tbody lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Salesforce Admin</td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Administers <span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span>, integrates <span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> features, and
              assigns permission set groups to admins who handle specific areas; for example, a
              catalog admin. Only Salesforce admins can set up Specification Types.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Designer</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Catalog Admin</td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Creates and manages attributes, attribute categories, product classifications,
              product classification attributes, product catalogs, and product categories.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Designer</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Designer</td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Creates and manages products, product groups, product attributes, product
              components, product relationships, and Qualification Rules. The Product Designer also
              assigns products to product categories.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Designer</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Discovery Admin</td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Manages features and settings. The Product Discovery Admin also customizes
              product browsing experience in Lightning App Builder and Experience Builder.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Designer</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Sales Agent</td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Browses catalogs and products, and can optionally create quotes, and place
              orders.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Viewer</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Partner Community User </td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Sells Product Catalog Management products to their customers via the partner
              community portal.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Partner Community User</td>

          </tr>
          <tr class="" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">
            <td headers="d36259e88" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Persona" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Customer Community User</td>

            <td headers="d36259e91" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Description" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Purchases Product Catalog Management products from the customer community
              portal.</td>

            <td headers="d36259e94" style="vertical-align:top;" class="slds-cell-wrap" data-label="Required Permission Sets" lwc-3eigj2skqo3=""><span lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Product Catalog Management</span> Customer Community User</td>

          </tr>
        </tbody></table><p lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">Assign <a title="Give users access to Product Catalog Management features. Review the supported products, editions, and permission sets for Product Catalog Management. Assign the prebuilt permission sets or custom permission set groups." href="https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=ind.product_catalog_product_catalog_management_permission_set_licenses.htm&amp;language=en_US&amp;type=5" lwc-3eigj2skqo3="">permission sets</a> to your users based on their persona.</p></div>
```
